# VibedGallery

> A curated gallery of apps built with AI coding tools. Submit a live URL, prove ownership with a verification file, and get listed after admin approval.

## Overview

VibedGallery showcases projects created with AI-assisted development tools like Cursor, Windsurf, Lovable, Bolt, Replit, Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, and v0. Users register, submit their app's live URL, verify site ownership via a token-based HTML file, and wait for human admin approval before the app appears in the public gallery.

## Stack

- Frontend: React 18, Vite 6, React Router 6, TanStack Query 5, Tailwind CSS 3, shadcn/ui (Radix), framer-motion, lucide-react
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres + RLS, Storage, Edge Functions)
- Anti-abuse: Cloudflare Turnstile captcha, Google Safe Browsing, Google Cloud Vision (image moderation)
- Email: Resend (via Edge Function)
- Hosting: Vercel (static SPA)

## Key Pages

- `/` — Homepage with featured/trending apps
- `/gallery` — Paginated, filterable, sortable app listing
- `/app/:id` — App detail with screenshots, upvotes, tags
- `/tag/:tag` — Apps filtered by tag
- `/maker/:userId` — Public maker profile
- `/submit` — Protected submission form (captcha + URL safety check + image upload + ownership verification)
- `/admin` — Admin review queue (approve/reject with server-side verification)
- `/profile` — User profile management and submission history
- `/how-it-works` — Submission flow explainer
- `/about` — About page

## Core Flow

1. User registers (email OTP or OAuth via GitHub/Google)
2. Submits app URL — Turnstile captcha, Safe Browsing check, image moderation
3. Downloads a verification HTML file containing a unique token
4. Deploys the file to their site's public folder
5. Admin reviews, runs server-side ownership verification, approves or rejects
6. Approved apps appear in the gallery; submitter is emailed either way

## Database Tables

- `profiles` — 1:1 with auth.users; role (user/admin)
- `apps` — submitted apps; status (pending_verification, pending_review, approved, rejected)
- `upvotes` — one row per (user, app)
- `bookmarks` — saved apps per user
- `public_profiles` — view exposing safe profile fields

## Edge Functions

- `send-email` — transactional email via Resend
- `verify-html` — server-side ownership file check (bypasses CORS)
- `verify-turnstile` — Cloudflare Turnstile captcha verification
- `check-url-safety` — Google Safe Browsing wrapper
- `check-image-safety` — Google Cloud Vision moderation
- `og-app` — dynamic Open Graph images for social sharing
- `sitemap` — dynamic sitemap generation

## Local Development

```bash
npm install
cp .env.local.example .env.local   # fill in values
npm run dev                        # http://localhost:5173
```

## Environment Variables

- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` — Supabase project URL
- `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` — Supabase anonymous key
- `VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY` — Cloudflare Turnstile site key (blank to bypass in dev)
- `VITE_APP_BASE_URL` — App base URL
